key_decisions: Both P0-1 and P0-2 are independent and can execute in parallel
P0-1 fix: use IFS= read or awk for porcelain parsing
P0-2 fix: read last_active_at from metadata, fallback to commit time

Missing metadata files fall back gracefully without error
